text: Njengoba uneBronchitis isibangele ukuthinteka kwemucosa yomphimbo ebesekubanga izimpawu ezinjokukhwehlela kanye nokuncipha kwebronchus.

text: Ungakhathazeki kakhulu. Akumele uzithathele wena umshanguzo uma uzizwa ungaphilile kodwa xhumana nodokotela akwazise inkinga futhi nendlela yokiyilapha.
